nasb.text: Immediately Jesus, perceiving in Himself that the power proceeding from Him had gone forth, turned around in the crowd and said, “Who touched My garments?”

esv.text: And Jesus, perceiving in himself that power had gone out from him, immediately turned about in the crowd and said, “Who touched my garments?”

cnv.text: 耶穌自己立刻覺得有能力從他裡面出去，就轉過身來對群眾說：“誰摸了我的衣服？”

ccb.text: 耶稣马上知道有能力从自己身上发出，便在人群中转过身来问：“谁摸了我的衣服？”

csbs.text: 耶稣自己里面立刻知道有能力从他而出，就在人群中转过身来，问：“谁摸了我的衣服？”
